scene_title: Sala de cinema vazia com projecao celestial
narrative_beat: Sala escura de cinema vazia com tela projetando ceu noturno com luz anomala

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an empty dark cinema auditorium with a massive screen projecting an abstract night sky with an anomalous luminous object
subject.focal_point: the bright anomalous light point on the projection screen
subject.secondary: Rows of crimson velvet seats in foreground. Dust particles floating in the projector beam.

environment.location: vintage cinema auditorium with high ceiling
environment.atmosphere: media revelation, cultural impact, collective unveiling

composition.foreground: crimson velvet seats in rich warm tones
composition.midground: converging aisle of seats leading forward
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white cinema walls with vintage art deco details

lighting.key_light: projector beam light across the space
lighting.rim_light: soft edge highlight on seat tops

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
